calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leslie E. Riley, via CourtCall, for Bellarose Baclig, Petitioner.

The court voices its concern regarding whether her client qualifies as a putative registered domestic partner under the putative spouse doctrine, as Carlos (decedent) and Bellarose never registered their domestic partnership with the California Secretary of State. Ms. Riley offers advocacy for her client's petition and refers the court to the consent of the decedent's sole heir Christina Montanes filed Jul-14-2022. The court confirms with Ms. Riley that she has nothing additional to add and submits on the papers.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
